meta.title: Huilauloa | Hui Kākoʻo Kaiāulu ma Kailua-Kona
meta.description: He hui kākoʻo kaiāulu ʻo Huilauloa ma Kailua-Kona no nā papahana ʻōpio, nā hanana moʻomeheu, ka mālama kai, a me ka hoʻokūkū heʻe nalu o Honl's.

hero.title: Huilauloa
hero.subtitle: Moʻomeheu · Kaiāulu · Kai
hero.date: Nā papahana a puni ka makahiki

about.label: No Mākou
about.title: Ke Kūkulu Pū Nei i Kaiāulu Paʻa
about.p1: He hui kākoʻo kaiāulu ʻo Huilauloa i hoʻokumu ʻia ma Kailua-Kona e kākoʻo i nā ʻohana, nā ʻōpio, a me ka moʻomeheu ma o nā papahana kūpono.
about.p2: I kēia manawa, ua hoʻololi ʻia kēia ʻaoʻao nui no ka hui holoʻokoʻa, a ʻo ka hoʻokūkū heʻe nalu o Honl's he ʻāpana hoʻokahi wale nō. E hoʻoponopono hou ʻia ka ʻōlelo pahuhopu ma hope.

u12.name: Ma Lalo o 12
u12.description: Nā keiki ʻōpio 11 makahiki a ma lalo e hōʻike ana i ke kāmua o ka papaheʻe nalu

u18.name: Ma Lalo o 18
u18.description: Māhele ʻōpio no ka poʻe hoʻokūkū 12–17 makahiki

dropknee.name: Kuli Haʻahaʻa
dropknee.description: Poʻe akamai DK me ka noho kuli hoʻokahi

schedule.label: Hanana
schedule.title: Papahana

start.title: Hoʻomaka ka Hoʻokūkū
start.sub: Nā puni Ma Lalo o 12 & Ma Lalo o 18

schedule.note: Hiki ke hoʻololi ka papahana ma muli o nā kūlana

sponsors.label: Nā Hoa
sponsors.title: Nā Hoa Kākoʻo Kaiāulu
sponsors.subtitle: Hana pū mākou me nā hui kūloko, nā ʻoihana, a me nā mea manawaleʻa no ka hopena lōʻihi ma Kona.

become.title: E Hui Pū me Huilauloa
become.description: Kōkua i ka mālama mau ʻana i nā papahana no nā ʻōpio, nā ʻohana, a me ka mālama kai ma ko mākou kaiāulu.

cta.title: Makemake e Kākoʻo i ka Pahuhopu?
cta.description: E hoʻopili mai e manawaleʻa, e hui, a e kōkua i ka hoʻonohonoho ʻana i nā papahana hou a Huilauloa.

register.label: Hoʻokūkū
register.title: Kākau Inoa
register.signInMessage: Pono ʻoe e komo e kākau inoa.

success.title: Ua Kākau Inoa ʻOe
success.message: E ʻike iā ʻoe ma Ke Kahakai o Honl, Iune 14–15, 2026.
success.view: E Nānā i Nā Kākau Inoa

form.dateOfBirthNote: Pono no nā māhele kaupalena makahiki
form.terms: Ma ke kākau inoa ʻana, ʻae ʻoe he mea pilikia ka heʻe papaheʻe nalu. Pono nā mea hoʻokūkū ma lalo o 18 makahiki e kakau kekahi makua i ka palapala ʻae ma ka palapala inoa.
form.submit: E Hoʻopau i ke Kākau Inoa

register.viewRegistrations: E nānā i nā kākau inoa

login.title: Aloha Mai
login.subtitle: E komo e hoʻoponopono i nā kākau inoa
login.invalidCredentials: ʻAʻole pololei ka leka uila a i ʻole ka ʻōlelo huna

errors.passwordLength: Pono ka ʻōlelo huna he 8 mau huapalapala ma ka liʻiliʻi loa
errors.accountCreated: Ua hana ʻia ka moʻokāki. E ʻoluʻolu e komo mai.

dashboard.label: Papa Kuhikuhi
dashboard.signInMessage: E komo e nānā i kāu papa kuhikuhi.

noRegistrations.title: ʻAʻohe Kākau Inoa
noRegistrations.message: ʻAʻole i kākau inoa ʻoe no kekahi māhele.
noRegistrations.button: E Kākau Inoa i Kēia Manawa

eventInfo.title: ʻIke Hanana
eventInfo.checkinValue: 6:30 AM i kēlā me kēia lā

standings.label: Ola
standings.title: Kūlana
standings.subtitle: Nā palapala hoʻokūkū a me nā hopena ma ka māhele

programs.label: Kā Mākou Hana
programs.title: Nā Papahana a me Nā Hana Nui
programs.subtitle: Mai ke kākoʻo ʻōpio a i ka mālama kai, kākoʻo ʻo Huilauloa i nā papahana alakaʻi kaiāulu a puni ka makahiki.

community.name: Kākoʻo Kaiāulu
community.description: Nā hanana kūloko, kōkua ʻohana, a me nā papahana hui e hoʻoikaika i ka pilina ma Kona.

youth.name: Hoʻomohala ʻŌpio
youth.description: Nā ala aʻo a alakaʻi e kōkua i nā keiki e ulu me ka hilinaʻi, kuleana, a me ka haʻaheo.

stewardship.name: Mālama Kai
stewardship.description: Nā papahana no ka mālama kahakai a me nā wai ma o ka aʻo, lawelawe, a me ka mālama pū.

honlsClassic.name: Hoʻokūkū Heʻe Nalu o Honl's
honlsClassic.description: He kuʻuna kaiāulu koʻikoʻi nō ka hoʻokūkū makahiki, a he ʻāpana ia o ka hana ākea a Huilauloa.

events.label: Alemanaka Kaiāulu
events.title: Nā Hana a puni ka Makahiki
events.subtitle: Loli nā papahana i kēlā me kēia kau me ka hui pū me nā ʻohana, nā kula, a me nā hoa kaiāulu.
events.note: E hoʻohou ʻia nā lā a me nā kikoʻī i ka pau ʻana o ka hoʻolālā.

spring.title: Nā Kūkākūkā Hoʻolālā Kaiāulu
spring.description: Nā kūkākūkā hāmama me nā kamaʻāina a me nā hoa no ka hoʻonohonoho i nā pahuhopu hou.

summer.title: Nā Papahana ʻŌpio a me ke Kai
summer.description: Nā hana lima a me nā hālāwai e kālele ana i ka komo ʻana o ka ʻōpio a me ka ʻike kai.

fall.title: Nā Hanana Moʻomeheu a Kaiāulu
fall.description: Nā hanana lehulehu e hoʻolauleʻa ana i nā waiwai like a me nā kuʻuna kūloko.

winter.title: Kau Hoʻokūkū o Honl's
winter.description: Ka hoʻomākaukau a me ke kākoʻo no ka hoʻokūkū makahiki ma loko o ka pahuhopu nui o ka hui.

contest.label: Hoʻokūkū Heʻe Nalu o Honl's
contest.title: Ke Kikowaena Hoʻokūkū o Honl's
contest.subtitle: Aia ma ʻaneʻi nā mea a pau no nā mea hoʻokūkū, nā ʻohana, a me nā mea kākoʻo.
contest.description: ʻO kēia ka ʻaoʻao kūikawā no ka hoʻokūkū ma loko o ka pūnaewele Huilauloa. E hoʻohana i nā loulou wikiwiki no ke kākau inoa, ka nānā kūlana, a me ka mālama palapala.

overview.label: Nānā Nui
overview.title: No ka Hoʻokūkū o Honl's
overview.p1: ʻO ka Hoʻokūkū Heʻe Nalu o Honl's kekahi hanana koʻikoʻi a Huilauloa e hōʻuluʻulu ana i nā mea heʻe nalu o nā makahiki like ʻole no ka hoʻokūkū a me ke kaiāulu.
overview.p2: I ka ulu ʻana o ka hanana, e noho mau kēia kikowaena i wahi nui no nā māhele, nā hoʻololi papahana, ke kākau inoa, a me nā kūlana ola.

divisions.label: Hoʻokūkū
divisions.title: Nā Māhele
divisions.description: E koho i kou māhele a e kākau inoa. E ʻike ʻia nā ʻike heat a me ke kūlana i ka wā e holo ana ka hanana.

schedule.label: Papahana Hanana
schedule.title: Papahana Hopena Pule
schedule.note: Hiki ke hoʻololi ka papahana ma muli o nā kūlana kai

partners.label: Kākoʻo
partners.title: Nā Hoa a me Nā Sponsor Hoʻokūkū
partners.subtitle: Makemake e kākoʻo pololei i ka hoʻokūkū o Honl's? Ke kūkulu nei mākou i nā pilina me nā sponsor a me nā hoa kaiāulu.

cta.title: Mākaukau e Hoʻokūkū?
cta.description: Ua wehe ke kākau inoa. E hoʻopaʻa i kou wahi ma ka māhele a e hui pū ma Ke Kahakai o Honl.
